name: Rattan Arch Leaf Kids' Shelf - Pillowfort™
description: Bring breezy charm and texture to your kid's room with this Rattan Arch Leaf Shelf from Pillowfort™. Constructed from rattan for effortless style and lovely warm texture, this decorative wall shelf features an arch leaf design with a built-in shelf to add just the right touch of interest to the look. The natural finish complements a variety of decor aesthetics for versatile design, and it features a single shelf for displaying decorative objects or for keeping their small essentials neat, tidy and easy to access.
